import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exact_capacity():
    """Items that exactly fill the remaining capacity must be considered."""
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]  # optimal solution uses the item weighing 3
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == 10, (
        f"Expected optimal value 10 when capacity={capacity} and items={items}, "
        f"but got {result} (buggy code likely skips items with weight == remaining capacity)."
    )
